title: Root & Ruin
description: A resource pack that overhauls the pale garden and the creaking, this requires EMF and ETF
body:
This project overhauls the Creaking and the Pale Garden, it requires the following mods to work: Entity Model Features (EMF) and Entity Texture Features (ETF).

Enjoy the pack, it took a long time to make.

You cannot sell or modify this pack, however if anyone wishes to share or use this resource pack in a youtube video, you must credit it in the description.
